title: hieracium verbascifolium subsp. verbascifolium
intro: Hieracium verbascifolium subsp. verbascifolium, also known as hawkweed or verbascifolium hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium verbascifolium subsp. verbascifolium include its potential to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, wounds, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
